name: ntfctl
title: Ntfctl
description: ntfctl — control macOS Notification Center from the keyboard — plus toggle Do Not Disturb — all from the keyboard via Raycast.
author: ahnopologetic

commands.name: clear-notifications
commands.title: Clear All Notifications
commands.subtitle: ntfctl
commands.description: Dismiss every visible notification banner in Notification Center.

commands.name: latest-notification
commands.title: Peek at Latest Notification
commands.subtitle: ntfctl
commands.description: Show the newest notification's app, title, and body.

commands.name: dismiss-notification
commands.title: Dismiss Latest Notification
commands.subtitle: ntfctl
commands.description: Dismiss only the top-most notification banner.

commands.name: notification-count
commands.title: Count Notifications
commands.subtitle: ntfctl
commands.description: Show how many notification banners are waiting.

commands.name: toggle-dnd
commands.title: Toggle Do Not Disturb
commands.subtitle: ntfctl
commands.description: Flip Do Not Disturb / Focus mode on or off.

commands.name: toggle-notification-center
commands.title: Toggle Notification Center
commands.subtitle: ntfctl
commands.description: Open or close the Notification Center panel.

commands.name: diagnostics
commands.title: Diagnostics
commands.subtitle: ntfctl
commands.description: Run diagnostics to check Accessibility permissions and Notification Center access.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
